title: Relationship Manager – Offshore Wealth (North Asia)
description:
Relationship Manager – Offshore Wealth (North Asia)

A leading international financial institution is expanding its offshore wealth management platform and is seeking an experienced Relationship Manager to cover the North Asia market from Singapore.

This role is ideal for a commercially driven professional with a strong network across North Asia, a proven ability to acquire offshore clients, and the capability to deliver sophisticated cross-border wealth solutions.

Key Responsibilities

  • Acquire and manage a portfolio of offshore high-net-worth clients from North Asia

  • Drive new client acquisition through referrals, personal networks, and market outreach

  • Provide holistic wealth management solutions across investments, discretionary mandates, lending, and insurance

  • Build long-term, trusted relationships with clients and their families

  • Work closely with internal product specialists to deliver tailored advisory solutions

  • Ensure strict adherence to regulatory, compliance, and cross-border requirements

Requirements

  • Minimum 3–5 years of offshore wealth or private banking experience

  • Established exposure to North Asia markets (e.g. Greater China, Taiwan, Korea)

  • Sound knowledge of offshore investment products and portfolio construction

  • Strong interpersonal, advisory, and stakeholder management skills

  • Ideal candidate profile: 7–10 years of experience, mid-career to senior RM level

Why Join

  • Platform with a strong and established offshore franchise in Asia

  • Broad product suite and investment capabilities across global markets

  • Clear career progression within offshore wealth management

  • Competitive compensation structure aligned with performance

All applications will be handled with strict confidentiality.

EA Licence: R1110891 | Licence No.: 24S2411

postedCompany.description:
We’re LMA, a professional recruitment agency that’s powered by curiosity. We’re here to create better outcomes for clients and jobseekers all around the world, by asking better, more meaningful questions that lead to positive change, for their companies, and their careers.

For our clients it gives us the ability to know your company better. To understand what ‘cultural fit’ really means. To find the candidate that’s ready for next, as well as right now.

For the candidates we serve, our curiosity drives deeper relationships, getting to know the real you, and not the you that only exists on paper. We operate within the finance, banking & financial services, human resources, operations, business support sectors across the UK, Asia and the US.
